direction_head.model: StandardScaler plus multinomial logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
direction_head.representation: mean and population SD over g=2..16 for each of 27 non-depth coordinates; identical to the external-panel depth grid
direction_head.score_interpretation: uncalibrated out-of-distribution score; not a probability or posterior
direction_head.training_selection: all positive canonical replicates at every migration rate

autosome_all_snps.interpretation: the filters are separate ascertainment analyses; any independently capped sets also differ through reservoir sampling

autosome_one_per_scaffold.interpretation: the filters are separate ascertainment analyses; any independently capped sets also differ through reservoir sampling

gate_head.model: StandardScaler plus binary logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
gate_head.representation: selected depth rows plus across-depth mean of 27 non-depth coordinates
gate_head.score_interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not the canonical 243-D gate probability
gate_head.training_target: positive migration with rate >=2.5e-4 versus weak positives plus control

guardrail: Circular, selection-enriched asymmetric-backcrossing OOD failure panel; never an external accuracy estimate. Candidate C is a heterogeneous majority label, not truth.

external_expectation.direction_basis: published parental-cross inference from autosomal, Z-chromosome, and mitochondrial ancestry
external_expectation.direction_truth_strength: heterogeneous majority heuristic: 9/14 candidate C, 3/14 reciprocal, 2/14 equal
external_expectation.linkage_scope: linked SNP-level panel capped by fixed-seed reservoir
external_expectation.locus_filter_variant: both alleles called across the complete three-population panel
external_expectation.selection_guardrail: P2 was selected for intermediate ancestry in this same ddRAD dataset

filter_contract.cap_method: fixed-seed reservoir over eligible loci, restored to source order
filter_contract.filter: PASS or dot (sources are author-filtered releases)
filter_contract.polymorphism: both REF and ALT must be called across every declared three-population panel
filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

input_audit.linkage_contract: linked SNP-level panel capped by fixed-seed reservoir

model_free_comparator.interpretation: reference-invariant descriptive geometry; projection is not bounded ancestry, and neither projection nor f3 estimates temporal direction

scaffold_block_bootstrap.guardrail: descriptive linked-locus sensitivity only; case ascertainment and label reuse remain
scaffold_block_bootstrap.method: nonparametric scaffold-block bootstrap with equal scaffold resampling

population_order.tree_contract: coordinate order imposed for feature extraction; P2 is not a panmictic tree leaf

simulation_feature_shift.reference: StandardScaler fitted to 2,700 positive regen_full summaries on the identical g=2..16 grid

simulation_gate.interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not a probability or posterior

simulation_head.interpretation: uncalibrated OOD scores; not probabilities or posteriors

external_expectation.locus_filter_variant: both alleles called within each of P1, P2, and P3; strong ascertainment, not a quality filter

population_design.later_metadata_warning: Sebastianelli et al. 2024 metadata classify AR93110 and AR93178 as sympatric, so these legacy pools must not be relabelled as exact current allopatric sets
population_design.reference_basis: legacy source-era taxon/locality reference pools from the 2019 supplement; AR93101/AR93102 appear as AR93101b/AR93102b in the released VCF

published_sample_audit.candidate_direction_mapping: majority cross has an extoni-enriched mother and relatively pusillus-enriched father; with extoni=P1, admixed=P2, pusillus=P3 this is candidate class C
published_sample_audit.direct_label_source_reuse: P2 was selected by fastSTRUCTURE ancestry from this deposited ddRAD dataset, and the direction label reuses autosomal-versus-Z ancestry in these same birds

fourteenth_sample.basis: omitted from Table 2 but explicitly named in the Discussion as a pusillus-haplotype female with an extoni father

published_sample_audit.truth_strength: heterogeneous majority heuristic: 9/14 candidate C, 3/14 reciprocal, 2/14 equal

runtime.process_priority: BelowNormal requested at runner start on Windows

anchored_autosome_extraction.selection: scaffold name matches scaf_<two-digit>_*, scaf_01A_*, or scaf_04A_*; Z and unplaced scaffolds excluded

source.assay: linked ddRAD SNPs aligned to a draft P. pusillus genome; Beagle-imputed VCF

one_per_scaffold_extraction.selection: first source-ordered single-base biallelic PASS/dot SNP per anchored-autosomal scaffold before panel genotype/polymorphism filtering

female_Z_ploidy_audit.conclusion: female birds are ZW, so these calls cannot be consumed as ordinary diploid autosomal genotypes; every scored panel is anchored-autosome-only

source_vcf_contract.source_paper_count_discrepancy: source VCF has 1,533 scaf_Z variants; paper section 3.3 reports 1,532
